# Rejourney

> Rejourney is an open-source AI funnel leak detection platform for web and mobile teams. It watches session replays, rage taps, API logs, crashes, journey loops, and drop-offs, then creates ranked fix packets for PMs, founders, and technical builders.

## Best Starting Points

- [Home](https://rejourney.co/): AI funnel leak detection overview for finding onboarding, checkout, activation, churn, and revenue leaks from session replay evidence.
- [About](https://rejourney.co/about): Company page for Rejourney's UT Austin origin, Austin location, and founders Mohammad Rashid and Fowwaz Moeen.
- [Pricing](https://rejourney.co/pricing): Fixed-price mobile analytics and session replay plans.
- [Record User Sessions](https://rejourney.co/record-user-sessions): Guide for recording real user sessions with replay quality, privacy controls, mobile support, and debugging context.
- [Self-Healing Software](https://rejourney.co/self-healing-software): Product and engineering workflow for turning replay, stability, API, device, and journey signals into fix-ready repair context.
- [Stability Monitoring](https://rejourney.co/stability-monitoring): Stability workflow for crashes, errors, ANRs, API spikes, affected users, devices, releases, and replay evidence.
- [API Endpoint Insights](https://rejourney.co/api-endpoint-insights): API endpoint analytics for endpoint volume, latency, failure codes, risk, and affected session evidence.
- [Device Insights](https://rejourney.co/device-insights): Device analytics for mobile app engagement, crash and ANR pressure, OS/app-version cohorts, and replay context.
- [Mobile Session Replay](https://rejourney.co/mobile-session-replay): Mobile replay for iOS, Expo, and React Native teams.
- [Web Session Replay](https://rejourney.co/web-session-replay): Browser replay for web apps, checkout, onboarding, account flows, and product dashboards.
- [Replay-First Mentality](https://rejourney.co/replay-first-mentality): Product thinking guide for grounding analytics, support, and bug triage in real sessions.
- [Importance of Open Source](https://rejourney.co/importance-of-open-source): Why source visibility, self-hosting, and auditability matter for replay data.
- [What Is Session Replay](https://rejourney.co/what-is-session-replay): Plain-English guide to session replay and how it supports product and engineering teams.
- [How to See What Your Users Do](https://rejourney.co/how-to-see-what-your-users-do): Practical guide for observing real behavior with replays, heatmaps, journeys, and events.
- [Be Your Users](https://rejourney.co/be-your-users): Team habit guide for watching real sessions before roadmap, design, and release decisions.
- [PostHog Session Replay Alternative](https://rejourney.co/alternatives/posthog-session-replay): Comparison page for teams evaluating Rejourney vs PostHog session replay.
- [Sentry Session Replay Alternative](https://rejourney.co/alternatives/sentry-session-replay): Comparison page for teams evaluating replay beyond error monitoring.
- [Engineering Log](https://rejourney.co/engineering): Technical articles on SDK architecture, pricing, scaling, SwiftPM, and map performance.
- [React Native SDK](https://rejourney.co/docs/reactnative/overview): Install and configure the React Native SDK.
- [Swift iOS SDK](https://rejourney.co/docs/swift/overview): Install and configure the native Swift iOS SDK.
- [Self-Hosted Deployment](https://rejourney.co/docs/selfhosted): Deploy Rejourney on your own infrastructure.

## Core Product Concepts

- AI funnel leak detection from replay evidence, rage taps, API logs, crashes, journey loops, and drop-offs.
- Mobile session replay for iOS, Android, Expo, React Native, and Swift applications.
- Touch heatmaps for mobile app screens, including rage tap and dead tap investigation.
- Crash reporting, ANR monitoring, and stability signals for production mobile apps.
- Stability monitoring for crashes, errors, ANRs, API spikes, affected users, devices, and releases.
- API endpoint insights for endpoint volume, latency, failure codes, risk, and session-level product impact.
- Device insights for mobile device analytics, engagement quality, issue pressure, and device-specific crash analytics.
- Self-healing software workflows that turn repeated production friction into replay-backed fix packets.
- Mobile journeys and product analytics for understanding funnels and user flows.
- Self-hosted observability deployment for teams that need data ownership.
- Open-source mobile observability alternative to usage-priced analytics platforms.
- Unlimited events, unlimited analytics data retention, unlimited team members, and unlimited projects for product analytics workflows.

## Engineering Articles By Search Intent

- [Ambiguity Kills App Growth](https://rejourney.co/engineering/2026-05-18/ambiguity-kills-app-growth): Targets API errors app growth, API errors user retention, mobile app API errors, crash vs API error retention, rage taps API errors, and session replay analytics.
- [Cheap Session Replay: Rejourney vs PostHog Cost Math](https://rejourney.co/engineering/2026-05-06/mobile-session-replay-cost): Targets cheap session replay, cheap mobile session replay, affordable session replay, session replay pricing, PostHog session replay cost, and fixed-price mobile observability.
- [SwiftPM Session Replay SDK: Rejourney Native iOS Beta](https://rejourney.co/engineering/2026-05-05/swift-package-open-beta): Targets SwiftPM session replay, native iOS observability, URLProtocol network tracking, and mobile replay SDK architecture.
- [Scaling Session Replay to 1.3M Replays](https://rejourney.co/engineering/2026-04-23/rejourney-1-3-million-session-replays): Targets session replay scaling, Cloudflare edge security, Redis ingest pipelines, HA Postgres, and replay storage architecture.
- [120Hz Map Session Replay for Apple Maps, Google Maps, and Mapbox](https://rejourney.co/engineering/2026-02-17/maps-performance): Targets mobile map session replay, Mapbox capture, Apple Maps capture, Google Maps capture, and ProMotion performance.
- [Mobile Session Replay Architecture](https://rejourney.co/engineering/2026-02-06/architecture-deep-dive): Targets pixel-perfect replay, GPU capture, privacy redaction, async replay pipelines, and mobile observability architecture.

## Documentation By Search Intent

- [React Native SDK](https://rejourney.co/docs/reactnative/overview): Mobile SDK setup, session replay, crash reporting, heatmaps.
- [Swift iOS SDK](https://rejourney.co/docs/swift/overview): Swift session replay SDK, native iOS analytics, privacy-safe mobile telemetry.
- [Self-Hosted Deployment](https://rejourney.co/docs/selfhosted): Self-hosted mobile analytics, self-hosted session replay, Docker deployment.
- [Backup and Recovery](https://rejourney.co/docs/selfhosted/backup-recovery): Self-hosted analytics backup and disaster recovery.
- [Troubleshooting](https://rejourney.co/docs/selfhosted/troubleshooting): SDK ingestion, deployment, networking, and storage troubleshooting.
- [Architecture Diagrams](https://rejourney.co/docs/architecture/diagrams): Session replay architecture and mobile analytics system design.
- [Distributed vs Single-Node Cloud](https://rejourney.co/docs/architecture/distributed-vs-single-node): Kubernetes vs single-node deployment for mobile observability.
- [CI/CD and Testing](https://rejourney.co/docs/architecture/ci-cd): SDK, backend, and dashboard test/release workflows.
- [Contributing](https://rejourney.co/docs/community/contributing): Open-source development setup and contribution workflow.
